name: Boulder Diameter and Trunk Counts from Sucha Woda Flood Event 2018
description: Dataset containing field measurements from the Sucha Woda flood event on July 24, 2018. Records include site location (latitude, longitude, elevation), counts of tree trunks (N trunks, N trunks_2), and diameters of 25 individual boulders (Boulder diam 1-25) collected at specific sites in the Sucha Woda area.
